visual_description: A close-up, profile shot focuses on a man with dark, slightly disheveled hair. He is holding a silver flip phone to his ear, his expression serious and concerned as he listens. The background is a blurry, cool-toned, and indistinct interior. In the top left corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera remains static, emphasizing the man's focused and somber mood. A man speaks in a calm and serious tone, his voice steady and direct as he gives instructions. "I'm in charge here now. If there's a shipment to be made, give me a call." The scene cuts to a medium shot of an older man with short, graying hair. He is also on the phone, holding it to his ear. He wears a black jacket and has a calm, slightly weary expression. The setting is a dimly lit, opulent room with a large, out-of-focus golden chandelier visible in the foreground and background. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top left corner. The camera is steady, capturing the man's composed demeanor. Another man responds with a single, conclusive phrase, "Done." The audio is clear, with no background music or significant sound
